title: Crunch Time for Chip Champions!
story: Every February 24, tortilla chip lovers across America celebrate National Tortilla Chip Day by munching their way through mountains of crunchy goodness! People host chip-tasting parties, trying everything from classic salted triangles to spicy jalapeño flavors. Restaurants offer special deals on nachos and chip platters. Social media fills with photos of epic dip spreads featuring guacamole, salsa, and queso. Some families even have chip-eating contests to see who can crunch the loudest or finish a bag the fastest!
activity_question: What do people often post on social media during National Tortilla Chip Day?
bonus_fact: Americans eat about 4 billion pounds of tortilla chips every year!

title: Estonia's Freedom Day Celebration
story: Every February 24, Estonia celebrates its Independence Day with parades, flag ceremonies, and traditional folk dancing in the streets! People wear blue, black, and white clothing to match their national flag colors. Families gather for special meals featuring Estonian foods like black bread and sauerkraut. The president gives speeches while children wave tiny flags and sing patriotic songs to honor their country's freedom.
activity_question: What colors do Estonians wear to celebrate their Independence Day?
bonus_fact: Estonia's flag colors represent the sky, soil, and snow of their beautiful country.

title: Swallowing Steel on World Sword Swallower's Day
story: Professional performers around the world celebrate their jaw-dropping talent on February 24 with World Sword Swallower's Day! These brave entertainers actually slide real metal blades down their throats without getting hurt. They spend years learning this ancient art that started with magicians and circus acts long ago. Today, sword swallowers gather at festivals, post amazing videos online, and teach people about their incredible skill. Some can swallow multiple swords at once or even curved blades! On this special day, they remind everyone that sword swallowing takes serious training and should never be tried at home.
activity_question: What do sword swallowers do to celebrate their skill on this day?
activity_choices: Gather at festivals and post videos online
Teach kids how to swallow spoons
Compete to see who can eat the fastest
activity_answer: Gather at festivals and post videos online
bonus_fact: Some sword swallowers can swallow curved blades or multiple swords at the same time!
